# autogen-governance-adapter

> APS + SINT + pluggable trust provider governance adapter for the AutoGen `before_tool_call` hook. One async function, three ordered checks (identity, authorization, optional trust), provider-agnostic interface. Python 3.10+, MIT.

The adapter ships the hook, the Ed25519 passport verifier, the delegation chain walker with monotonic-narrowing invariant, and the `TrustProvider` Protocol. It does no network I/O for identity or authorization; the only network call is the optional trust-packet fetch, which is verified offline against the provider's advertised JWKS. Substrate requirements ride inside delegation scope as `inference_substrate:<id>` and `min_capability_tier:<T>` tokens — not as a parallel gate.

## Canonical references

- [README](https://github.com/aeoess/autogen-governance-adapter/blob/main/README.md) — install, quickstart, composition
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/aeoess/autogen-governance-adapter/blob/main/AGENTS.md) — adapter-consumer wiring + coding-agent contract
- [src/autogen_governance_adapter/hook.py](https://github.com/aeoess/autogen-governance-adapter/blob/main/src/autogen_governance_adapter/hook.py) — `governedToolCall()` entry point
- [src/autogen_governance_adapter/trust_provider.py](https://github.com/aeoess/autogen-governance-adapter/blob/main/src/autogen_governance_adapter/trust_provider.py) — provider Protocol + `TrustPacket`
- [providers/moltbridge/](https://github.com/aeoess/autogen-governance-adapter/tree/main/providers/moltbridge) — first provider lane (pending @EchoOfDawn)

## Related projects

- [microsoft/autogen#7525](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen/issues/7525) — composition thread that seeded this repo
- [APS SDK](https://github.com/aeoess/agent-passport-system) — one identity + delegation implementation
- [MoltBridge](https://github.com/sagemind-ai/moltbridge) — behavioral trust provider (pending first PR)
- [MolTrust](https://github.com/moltycel/moltrust) — constraint envelopes trust provider (pending)
